messages.content:
Bot1 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic
- 12 Bread
- 40 Oak Planks

arguments.message: Hostiles haven't spawned yet. In this flat world with no cover, I propose we build a defensive wall early. Bot2, I'll coordinate the build at (1,0,1). You confirm and I'll execute via new_action.

arguments.name: build_defensive_wall
arguments.description: Build a defensive wall at position (1,0,1) with length 3, height 2 using oak_planks

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Hostiles haven't spawned yet. In this flat world with no cover, I propose we build a defensive wall early. Bot2, I'll coordinate the build at (1,0,1). You confirm and I'll execute via new_action."
